prompt: Using REFERENCE_0, edit only the cat’s lower body by adding snug dark gray yoga pants/leggings. Keep the cat’s pose, head, upper torso, fur pattern, tail, collar, floor mat, cardboard, lighting, camera angle, and photo-realistic quality unchanged.
